twofer 03-28-26

Mar 28, 2026 • joe jenett • posted in: miscellany   notables
  • Defuddle

    Get the main content of any page as clean, readable Markdown.

    [ 📌mikael + 📌tdjones ]

  • theSVG - ...for Developers and Designers

    Search, copy, and ship 5,645+ brand SVG icons. Free, open-source library with npm packages, React components, CLI, CDN, and MCP server. Tree-shakeable, typed, zero config.

    [ 📌vipom ]

mixed bag 03-26-26

Mar 26, 2026 • joe jenett • posted in: miscellany   lists
  • Tablecruncher

    This free and powerful CSV editor helps you crunch all your tabular data. On Windows, macOS and Linux.

    [ 📌cogdog ]

    Note: This is not an endorsement.

  • FontCrafter

    Turn your handwriting into an installable font — free, no account, no uploads. Works on every platform and the web. Print, write, scan, download.

    [ 📌richie5um ]

  • Famelack

    Watch free live world TV and listen to online radio stations from around the world. No account, no signup, no ads. Stream global news, music, and culture...

    [ 📌ideoforms ]

  • Timelinize - Everything at home

    Timelinize ("time-lynn-eyes") is an open source personal archival suite, designed for modern family history. It organizes all your data onto a single, unified timeline on your own computer.

    [ 📌mikael ]

    Note: This is not an endorsement.

  • Boing by GReg TeChnoLogY

    😮

    [ 📌roger ]

twofer 03-24-26

Mar 24, 2026 • joe jenett • posted in: miscellany   notables
  • Miniroll - Your blogroll, anywhere

    Create, manage, and share your blogroll. Import from OPML, embed anywhere, discover others.

    [ 📌bradbarrish ]

  • cmux — The terminal built for multitasking (macOS) (github)

    Native macOS app built on Ghostty. Vertical tabs, notification rings when agents need attention, split panes, and a socket API for automation.

    [ 📌thulstrup ]

    Note: This is not an endorsement.
